scripts.hardware:bleak:latest: SMARTGLASSES_REPORT_PATH=/tmp/smartglasses-hardware-report-latest.json SMARTGLASSES_WEARING_TIMEOUT_MS=90000 SMARTGLASSES_HOLD_MS=90000 SMARTGLASSES_DIRECT_MIC_MS=10000 bun run hardware:bleak
scripts.hardware:bleak:watch: SMARTGLASSES_REPORT_PATH=/tmp/smartglasses-hardware-report-latest.json SMARTGLASSES_WEARING_TIMEOUT_MS=600000 SMARTGLASSES_HOLD_MS=120000 SMARTGLASSES_DIRECT_MIC_MS=10000 bun run hardware:bleak
scripts.hardware:prove:bleak: sh -c 'bun run hardware:bleak:latest; bun run hardware:status-latest; bun run hardware:validate-latest'
scripts.hardware:prove:bleak:watch: sh -c 'bun run hardware:bleak:watch; bun run hardware:status-latest; bun run hardware:validate-latest'
scripts.hardware:noble: bun run --cwd ../../../plugins/plugin-facewear build && node ../../../packages/scripts/ensure-workspace-symlinks.mjs && bun run noble-hardware-smoke.ts
scripts.hardware:noble:latest: SMARTGLASSES_REPORT_PATH=/tmp/smartglasses-hardware-report-latest.json SMARTGLASSES_WEARING_TIMEOUT_MS=90000 SMARTGLASSES_HOLD_MS=90000 SMARTGLASSES_DIRECT_MIC_MS=10000 bun run hardware:noble
scripts.hardware:noble:watch: SMARTGLASSES_REPORT_PATH=/tmp/smartglasses-hardware-report-latest.json SMARTGLASSES_WEARING_TIMEOUT_MS=600000 SMARTGLASSES_HOLD_MS=120000 SMARTGLASSES_DIRECT_MIC_MS=10000 bun run hardware:noble
scripts.hardware:prove:noble: sh -c 'bun run hardware:noble:latest; bun run hardware:status-latest; bun run hardware:validate-latest'
scripts.hardware:prove:noble:watch: sh -c 'bun run hardware:noble:watch; bun run hardware:status-latest; bun run hardware:validate-latest'
scripts.smoke:package: bun run --cwd ../../../plugins/plugin-facewear build && node ../../../packages/scripts/ensure-workspace-symlinks.mjs && bun run package-smoke.ts
scripts.smoke:runtime: node ../../../packages/scripts/run-turbo.mjs run build --filter=@elizaos/plugin-facewear --concurrency=1 && node ../../../packages/scripts/ensure-workspace-symlinks.mjs && bun run eliza-runtime-smoke.ts
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd ../../../plugins/plugin-facewear build && node ../../../packages/scripts/ensure-workspace-symlinks.mjs && BUN_INSTALL_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/eliza-bun-cache-clean bunx --package typescript@6.0.3 tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
scripts.verify:software: bun run lint && bun run test && bun run test:protocol && bun run hardware:test-bleak-parser && bun run hardware:test-doctor && bun run typecheck && bun run smoke:package && bun run smoke:runtime && bun run smoke:simulator
